brand_identity.name: Ladakh Moto Market
brand_identity.emotional_tone: The thrill of the Himalayas meets the precision of professional gear.

usage.gradients: No generic gradients. Use subtle radial gradients for spotlights: 'bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-zinc-800/50 via-zinc-950 to-zinc-950'

grid_system.marketplace: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
grid_system.hero: h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-6 rounded-none clip-path-slant
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-6 rounded-none

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden rounded-none

inputs.style: bg-background border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-none h-12 px-4

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 border-b border-white/10 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl

modals.content: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 p-0 rounded-none shadow-2xl

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

assets.icons: Use lucide-react. Prefer outlined, sharp icons (stroke-width={1.5}).

rules: All images must have descriptive alt text.
Do not rely on color alone for status (use icons + text).

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid dark colors or subtle noise textures.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings (h1-h6). Use 'Manrope' for body text.
Buttons should be rectangular (rounded-none or rounded-sm) to match the rugged aesthetic.
Input fields should have a distinct border and no heavy background fill.
Use distinct 'data-testid' for all interactive elements.
Avoid 'center-everything'. Use asymmetry and grid alignments.
For dashboards, use high-density grids. Don't waste space.
Add 'hover:text-primary' to all interactive text links.
Glassmorphism is allowed for sticky headers and floating panels only.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Update index.css to import Barlow Condensed and Manrope.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors and font families provided.
3. UPDATE BASE STYLES: Set body background to #09090b and text to #fafafa in index.css.
4. CREATE LAYOUT: Build a MainLayout component that includes the sticky glass header and footer.
5. BUILD PAGES: Start with the Landing Page using the provided Hero image and typography rules.
